purpose: De-circularize the Build-10 powered-null claim (quotient-level grid-respecting injection), close or open the H2-null-mimic gap (balanced pairs through the full battery in real channels), and benchmark the provenance channel against naive digit detectors including subtle grids.
instruments: unchanged: canonical integerization; 2*5 de-rounding; deep strip <=7 with core-magnitude re-indexing vs baseline_coremag cut=7; encoding coordinates from the corpus battery (rounding_mass, trailing-10 depth, grid conformance, c2/c5 shares, residue TV at the corpus moduli 25/49/47/43, digit-conditioned rounding mass = the project's standard digit conditioning applied to the encoding block). This build TESTS the cascade, it does not tune it.
hosts: the six Build-10 host channels (frozen selection rule of run hard10), capped 15000 records each; replacement targets restricted to records whose 2*5-quotient core >= 300 (a 2-4-factor quotient product needs magnitude; logged, grid-respecting by construction)

construction.tier_a_naive: value = g0 * Q, g0 = the host's modal grid 10^mode(trailing-10 depth > 0); Q = product of 2 factors coprime to 10, magnitude sampled iid from the host's marginal 2*5-quotient-core magnitude distribution
construction.tier_b_magnitude_matched: per-record core replacement: v' = G_i * Q with G_i = 2^a2 * 5^a5 of a sampled host record (its exact grid part kept) and log10(Q) matched to that record's quotient core (+-0.04 jitter); Q = product of 2 factors coprime to 10
construction.tier_c_base_matched_adversarial: as tier b, plus Q = 3^b3 * 7^b7 * R with (b3,b7) sampled from the host's empirical joint deep-core (a3,a7) exponent distribution and R = balanced product of 2 factors coprime to 210 (survives the <=7 strip as a composite of primes > 7)

stage1_quotient_spikein.detection: STRIPPED-CORE multiplicative statistics only: keff_core_c7 (primary, direction up) and dTail_core_c7 (up), each vs the channel's own f=0 record-bootstrap q95 (R=400, n-matched); channel recovered at f iff the median over replicates of keff_core_c7 exceeds q95
stage1_quotient_spikein.confound_check: mandatory: encoding coordinates of each injected SET (rounding_mass, trailing-10 depth mean, TV mod 100, c2_share, c5_share) z-scored against host record-bootstrap samples of the same size; tier passes iff max|z| < 3; a tier that drifts is CONFOUNDED and reported as such
stage1_quotient_spikein.retrospective: the Build-10 off-grid unrounded injection re-run once at f=0.10 with the same confound table plus injected-vs-host core-digit comparison, to quantify how much of the original recovery co-occurred with encoding drift
stage1_quotient_spikein.decision_rule: POWERED iff tier b (grid-respecting, magnitude-matched) is recovered at some f <= 0.10 in >= 4/6 channels on the stripped-core statistics AND tier b passes the confound check in those channels; otherwise the powered-null claim reframes as DERIVATION-PLUS-ILLUSTRATION. Tier c is the adversarial bound, reported either way; tier a reported.

stage2_balanced_pairs.construction: grid-respecting core replacement (as tier b) with Q = p*q, p and q primes with log p ~= log q (balanced, |log10 p - log10 q| <= 0.1), magnitudes matched to the host's quotient cores; primes drawn from precomputed per-0.1-dex prime pools
stage2_balanced_pairs.battery: full-profile on stripped (<=7) cores: PRIMARY = per-channel energy distance of padded sorted core profiles to a fixed uniform-integer core reference cloud (direction up); reported alongside: mean core atom count (down), mean core Tail (down), mean core L3 (down); keff_core reported (expected only PARTIALLY blind here - registered caveat below)
stage2_balanced_pairs.registered_caveat_keff: the H2 = 1/2 identity is asymptotic: E[H2|d] -> 1/2 only as d grows; at the host quotient-core magnitudes in play (core_d ~ 3-8) E[H2|d] = 0.64-0.89 > 1/2, so keff may partially see balanced pairs at these magnitudes; the blind-spot statement in the paper is a large-d statement and will be corrected to say so
stage2_balanced_pairs.h2_arithmetic: for distinct p,q: with l1 = ln p / ln n >= 1/2, H2 = 1/2 + 2(l1 - 1/2)^2 > 1/2 strictly; the 'identity' is the balanced limit; the build quantifies distance from the null band as a function of imbalance
stage2_balanced_pairs.decision_rule: the H2-mimic gap is CLOSED iff the PRIMARY battery statistic (energy distance) detects balanced-pair injections (median over replicates > f=0 bootstrap q95) at some f <= 0.10 in >= 4/6 channels; keff behavior reported without bearing on the rule

stage3_naive_benchmark.naive_battery: (a) last-digit histogram chi2 vs the host reference half; (b) trailing-zero-count distribution chi2 vs reference; (c) last-two-digit (mod 100) chi2 vs reference (the duplication/number-test tradition)
stage3_naive_benchmark.encoding_score: max |z| over {rounding_mass, trailing-10 depth, frac on host modal grid, c2_share, c5_share, TV mod 25, TV mod 49, TV mod 47, TV mod 43, digit-conditioned rounding-mass split (|rm(lower-magnitude half) - rm(upper half)| - the project's standard digit conditioning)}; z-scored on 200 clean calibration windows
stage3_naive_benchmark.windows: w = min(1000, floor(n_clean/3)); 100 clean vs 100 test windows per cell; AUC by rank
contrasts: ces_persons_vs_qcew_state (existing provenance result - tie expected, reported)
b10_offgrid_injection f=0.10 on host 1, real-donor and leading-digit-matched adversarial (ties on obvious grids expected)

subtle_tick_47_vs_43: host = real channel re-quantized to a 47-tick, foreign = the same values on a 43-tick, f=0.10 windows - neither grid announces itself mod 10/100 (both coprime to 100); prediction: naive fails (AUC < 0.6), encoding reads the tick via residue TV mod 47/43

subtle_mixed_era: host = two precision eras correlated with magnitude (dollar-rounded low-magnitude era + cent-precision recent era); foreign = marginal-matched but magnitude-independent precision; prediction: naive marginal tests tie out, digit-conditioned rounding mass fires
stage3_naive_benchmark.decision_rule: the encoding channel ADDS VALUE iff there exists >= 1 contrast where max(naive AUCs) < 0.6 AND encoding AUC >= 0.8; ties on obvious grids are expected and reported without spin; if no such contrast exists the channel is reported as REDUNDANT-WITH-NAIVE on the tested set

hygiene: fully autonomous; frozen rules before computation; deviations logged to run_config_power13_acquisition.json and continued; figures PNG dpi 200; seeds + workers recorded
